meaning: n.齐格弗里德(德国民间史诗<<尼贝龙根之歌>>中的英雄人物)
examples: The main characters are a boy called Siegfried and his little sister Hannah.
On the weekend I read a totally amazing book called The Adventures of Siegfried and Hannah.

But more important, says Siegfried Hecker, are possible local conflicts that nations face.
